{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Twin Star emblem
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Twin Star emblem]] is worn on [[Jai Long]]'s outer robe.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Actions taken while wearing the [[Twin Star emblem]] are attributed to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
